value.found_quote: Claude Code installs into any dev container through the [Claude Code Dev Container Feature](https://github.com/anthropics/devcontainer-features/tree/main/src/claude-code).
value.rationale: The page explicitly describes the Claude Code Dev Container Feature, stating it installs Claude Code (the CLI) into any dev container, matching the claim directly. It is presented as a current, available offering with no indication of deprecation.
